sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Air Accidents Investigation Branch (AAIB) has released its monthly bulletin for October 2025. This bulletin includes a compilation of recent reports and findings from the AAIB, providing updates on air accidents and incidents that have occurred.

Published on the second Thursday of each month, the AAIB Bulletin serves as a vital resource for the aviation community, offering insights into safety improvements and lessons learned. Scottish aviation heritage is reflected in this commitment to safety, as airports across Scotland contribute to the connectivity of communities and the history of air travel since the inter-war period.

sourceReferences.citationText: aaib-bulletins – Independent report: Air accident monthly bulletin October 2025
